action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "We are in /app on a Linux system. The task is to compile SQLite with gcov instrumentation using the pre-vendored source snapshot at /app/vendor/sqlite-fossil-release.tar.gz, place the resulting sqlite3 binary under /app/sqlite, and make it available in PATH. We need to extract the tarball, locate sqlite3.c and shell.c (amalgamation and CLI), compile with GCC using coverage flags, install to /app/sqlite/bin, and export PATH to include that directory. We'll verify the build and PATH setup.",
  "plan": "1) Inspect the vendor directory to confirm the tarball is present. 2) Create /app/sqlite/src and /app/sqlite/bin. 3) Write a build script that extracts the tarball into /app/sqlite/src, detects the extracted top-level directory, finds sqlite3.c and shell.c, compiles sqlite3 with gcc using --coverage -O0 -g and links with -ldl -lpthread -lm, then copies the binary to /app/sqlite/bin. 4) Run the build script. 5) Export PATH to include /app/sqlite/bin for the current session. 6) Verify that sqlite3 is found in PATH and prints its version. 7) Optionally list .gcno files to confirm coverage instrumentation artifacts were generated.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la /app/vendor
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "mkdir -p /app/sqlite/src /app/sqlite/bin
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/build_sqlite.sh << 'EOF'
set -euo pipefail
SRC_TAR="/app/vendor/sqlite-fossil-release.tar.gz"
if [ ! -f "$SRC_TAR" ]; then
  echo "Source tarball not found at $SRC_TAR" >&2
  exit 1
fi
# Determine top-level directory name from tarball
SRC_DIR_NAME="$(tar -tzf "$SRC_TAR" | head -1 | cut -d/ -f1)"
# Extract into /app/sqlite/src
if [ ! -d "/app/sqlite/src/$SRC_DIR_NAME" ]; then
  tar -xzf "$SRC_TAR" -C /app/sqlite/src
fi
cd "/app/sqlite/src/$SRC_DIR_NAME"
# Find amalgamation and shell sources
SQLITE3_C="$(find . -maxdepth 2 -name 'sqlite3.c' | head -1)"
SHELL_C="$(find . -maxdepth 2 -name 'shell.c' | head -1)"
if [ -z "$SQLITE3_C" ] || [ -z "$SHELL_C" ]; then
  SQLITE3_C="$(find . -name 'sqlite3.c' | head -1)"
  SHELL_C="$(find . -name 'shell.c' | head -1)"
fi
if [ -z "$SQLITE3_C" ] || [ -z "$SHELL_C" ]; then
  echo "Could not locate sqlite3.c or shell.c in source tree" >&2
  find . -name 'sqlite3.c' -o -name 'shell.c' >&2 || true
  exit 1
fi
echo "Building sqlite3 from $SQLITE3_C and $SHELL_C with gcov instrumentation"
# Compile with coverage flags
gcc --coverage -O0 -g "$SQLITE3_C" "$SHELL_C" -o sqlite3 -ldl -lpthread -lm
# Install to /app/sqlite/bin
install -m 0755 sqlite3 /app/sqlite/bin/sqlite3
echo "Build complete: /app/sqlite/bin/sqlite3"
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "bash /app/build_sqlite.sh
",
      "duration": 10.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "export PATH="/app/sqlite/bin:$PATH"
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "which sqlite3
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sqlite3 --version
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "find /app/sqlite/src -maxdepth 3 -name '*.gcno' -or -name '*.gcda' | head -n 20
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": true
}
